allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add zoom/time-selection feature

Click-and-drag on any graph panel selects a time range and navigates to
a single-graph zoom view. The zoom view shows the selected window with
editable start/end datetime inputs, a zoom-out button \(doubles duration
centered on midpoint\), further drag-to-zoom, and a back button.

Backend: add _locator_and_format\(\), render_graph_for_window\(\), refactor
_style_axes to infer tick density from duration rather than range string,
add optional ?start=&end= Unix timestamp params to GET /api/graph/.

Frontend: add graphUrlWindow\(\) to api.js, drag-select overlay on each
GraphPanel in GraphView, new ZoomView component, zoom state wired in App.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
